metadata.note: Sub-case A2 (anchor == subject): `AUKUS` is a near-perfect gate -- 70 titles/180d, nothing else in the corpus is AUKUS. participants={OCEANIA-AUSTRALIA} only, primary_target=null. Deliberately NO domain verbs (`alliance`, `deal`, `deterrence`): aliases are OR'd with no AND, and a bare `alliance` under the Australia centroid would swallow the Australia-Fiji defence pact that belongs to pacific_island_contest. `Osborne`/`Henderson` (the shipyards) are DROPPED -- word-START matching makes them collide with the surnames. Only the named platforms and sites survive alongside the acronym.
